calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-565145, CGC-18-565146, CGC-18-566940, CGC-19-576884, CGC-19-578486, CGC-19-581218 WITH CASE CGC-19-580184
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Juniper Bacon, Esq. of BHC LAW GROUP, T:510.658.3600, for Chariot Transit, Inc.;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS ALEXANDRA BOZMAN, VERONIQUE CONRAD-DORMOY, TRENT DAY, MELYSSA MENDOZA, MICHAEL PENDERGAST, MARCO ZORZI's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-565145, CGC-18-565146, CGC-18-566940, CGC-19-576884, CGC-19-578486, CGC-19-581218 WITH CASE CGC-19-580184 is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The cases are consolidated for all puposes and the lead case is CGC-18-565145.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
